name: Ben
goal: Ben hopes to find a creative way to combine Tina's love of surprises with his own fondness for outdoor activities to create an unforgettable and fun celebration for her 25th birthday.
backstory: Ben has been friends with Tina since college and has always made it a point to celebrate her birthday in style, including a memorable road trip on her 21st birthday. He's particularly excited about planning a secret party for her 25th birthday because he knows how much she loves surprises. Ben also has a personal preference for outdoor activities and thinks a fun party game or scavenger hunt would be a great addition to the celebration.

focus_notes.cost: For Ben, cost is a consideration but not the top priority - he's willing to spend a bit extra to ensure Tina has an unforgettable birthday.
focus_notes.comfort: Ben thinks comfort is crucial for a successful party, and wants to make sure Tina feels relaxed and able to enjoy herself, whether that means choosing a familiar venue or planning activities she'll love.
focus_notes.time: Given the surprise nature of the party, Ben is mindful of timing and wants to make sure everything runs smoothly and according to schedule, without feeling too rushed or leaving guests waiting.
focus_notes.safety: While safety isn't a major concern for this type of celebration, Ben will still consider factors like guest list management and venue choice to ensure everyone has a safe and enjoyable experience.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Ben recognizes that unexpected things can happen, especially with a surprise party, so he's prepared to be flexible and adapt plans if needed to ensure the celebration stays on track and Tina has a great time.
